sentences.english: So, Mr. Park, your chart says you've been experiencing frequent headaches. Tell me more about that.
sentences.korean: 박 씨, 차트에 잦은 두통이 있다고 나와 있네요. 좀 더 자세히 말씀해주세요.

sentences.english: Yes, it's been going on for about six weeks now. I get these headaches almost every day, usually in the afternoon. They start at the back of my head and kind of spread to my temples.
sentences.korean: 네, 약 6주 정도 됐어요. 거의 매일 두통이 오는데, 보통 오후에요.

sentences.english: On a scale of one to ten, how would you rate the pain?
Usually around a six or seven. It's not unbearable, but it definitely affects my concentration at work.
sentences.korean: 보통 6이나 7 정도요. 참을 수 없는 건 아니지만, 확실히 직장에서 집중력에 영향을 줘요.

sentences.english: I see. Have you noticed anything that makes the headaches worse or better?
sentences.korean: 그렇군요. 두통을 악화시키거나 나아지게 하는 것이 있나요?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: They seem worse when I've been staring at my computer screen for a long time. And they get a little better when I lie down in a dark room.
sentences.korean: 컴퓨터 화면을 오래 보면 더 심해지는 것 같고, 어두운 방에서 누우면 좀 나아져요.

sentences.english: That's helpful information. How much screen time would you say you get per day?
sentences.korean: 유용한 정보네요. 하루에 스크린 타임이 얼마나 되나요?

sentences.english: Easily ten to twelve hours, between work and personal use.
sentences.korean: 쉽게 10~12시간은 돼요, 업무와 개인 사용 합쳐서.

sentences.english: Not great, honestly. I usually go to bed around midnight and wake up at six. And I don't sleep very deeply — I wake up a lot during the night.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 별로예요. 보통 자정쯤 자고 6시에 일어나요.

sentences.english: Based on what you're describing, this sounds like it could be tension-type headaches, possibly aggravated by eye strain and poor sleep. I'd like to run a few tests just to rule out anything else.
sentences.korean: 말씀하신 것을 바탕으로, 긴장성 두통인 것 같은데 눈의 피로와 수면 부족이 악화시킬 수 있어요.

sentences.english: In the meantime, I'm going to recommend reducing your screen time where possible, taking regular breaks using the 20-20-20 rule — every twenty minutes, look at something twenty feet away for twenty seconds — and improving your sleep hygiene.
sentences.korean: 그동안 가능한 한 스크린 타임을 줄이시고, 20-20-20 규칙으로 규칙적으로 휴식을 취하시길 권합니다.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: History Lecture — The Fall of the Berlin Wall
